title: Add allow/3 to a Task.Supervisor.async_stream consumer
prompt: Write a test at `test/my_app/batch_processor_test.exs` that uses `Task.Supervisor.async_stream_nolink(MyApp.TaskSupervisor, [1,2,3], fn id -> MyApp.Reports.fetch_report(id) end)` and reduces the stream into a list. Before consuming the stream, grant allowance to every child task. Pattern: use the stream's `max_concurrency: 1` option and allow the task's pid as it is created. Include `use MyApp.DataCase, async: true`.
tier_rationale: async_stream is a well-known pattern; the discriminator is allowing children that don't exist until stream enumeration.
